summary: Concrete template configuration and reusable interface case matrices are authored by a dedicated configuration subagent. The main agent maintains shared tools, validators, runners, and review surfaces.
mainAgentResponsibilities: maintain shared template pages, tools, validators, runners, and Store contracts
review configuration subagent handoff evidence before accepting profile changes
turn reported authoring friction into generic sandbox improvements
subagentResponsibilities: author concrete profile configuration from business requirements and authoritative interface documents
use only the profile template configuration contract and supported tools
report changed files, validation commands, evidence, and authoring friction
